CustomField.formula: IF(TODAY() < Scheduling_Date__c, Application__c == NULL, IF( TODAY() == Scheduling_Date__c, Check_In_Status__c != 'Late Check in' && Check_Out_Status__c == 'Early Check out', Check_In_Status__c == 'Check in' && Check_Out_Status__c == 'Check out' ) )
CustomField.label: Is Normal
